meta.summary: Quality control analysis for high-throughput sequencing data, producing HTML and zip reports for FASTQ, SAM, and BAM inputs.
meta.description: Quality control analysis for high-throughput sequencing data, producing HTML and zip reports for FASTQ, SAM, and BAM inputs.

test: fastqc --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'FastQC - A high throughput sequence QC analysis tool' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastqc-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-fastqc-smoke && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && fastqc --quiet --outdir out reads.fq && test -s out/reads_fastqc.html && test -s out/reads_fastqc.zip && unzip -p out/reads_fastqc.zip reads_fastqc/summary.txt | grep -F 'Basic Statistics' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastqc-gzip && cd /tmp/taf-fastqc-gzip && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && gzip -c reads.fq > reads.fastq.gz && mkdir -p gzout && fastqc --quiet --outdir gzout reads.fastq.gz && test -s gzout/reads_fastqc.html && test -s gzout/reads_fastqc.zip

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastqc-bzip2 && cd /tmp/taf-fastqc-bzip2 && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && bzip2 -c reads.fq > reads.fastq.bz2 && mkdir -p bzout && fastqc --quiet --outdir bzout reads.fastq.bz2 && test -s bzout/reads_fastqc.html && test -s bzout/reads_fastqc.zip

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastqc-sam && cd /tmp/taf-fastqc-sam && printf '@HD	VN:1.0	SO:unsorted
@SQ	SN:chr1	LN:1000
r1	0	chr1	1	60	24M	*	0	0	ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT	FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.sam && mkdir -p samout && fastqc --quiet --format sam --outdir samout reads.sam && test -s samout/reads_fastqc.html && test -s samout/reads_fastqc.zip

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastqc-options && cd /tmp/taf-fastqc-options && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
@r2
TGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCA
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && printf 'Adapter1	ACGTACGTACGT
' > adapters.txt && mkdir -p optout && fastqc --quiet --nogroup --svg --kmers 5 --memory 256 --threads 1 --adapters adapters.txt --outdir optout reads.fq && test -s optout/reads_fastqc.html && test -s optout/reads_fastqc.zip && unzip -l optout/reads_fastqc.zip | grep -F '.svg' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-fastqc-extract && cd /tmp/taf-fastqc-extract && printf '@r1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
+
FFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF
' > reads.fq && mkdir -p extractout && fastqc --quiet --extract --outdir extractout reads.fq && test -d extractout/reads_fastqc && test -s extractout/reads_fastqc/fastqc_data.txt

upstream.name: FastQC
upstream.citation: Andrews S. FastQC: a quality control tool for high throughput sequence data. 2010.
